SEARCH
Package com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators

Interface ReferendumEvaluator<T extends Referendum>

Type Parameters:
T - The type of referendum to be evaluated.
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractReferendumEvaluator, ConditionalReferendumEvaluator, QuotaReferendumEvaluator, SimpleReferendumEvaluator
public interface ReferendumEvaluator<T extends Referendum>
Generic interface for evaluating referendums Implementations of this interface are responsible for evaluating the outcome of a specific type of referendum based on collected referendum forms

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReferendumResult
    evaluate(T referendum, List<ReferendumForm> referendumForms)
    Evaluates the outcome of the given referendum based on collected referendum forms

  • Method Details

    • evaluate

      ReferendumResult evaluate(T referendum, List<ReferendumForm> referendumForms)
      Evaluates the outcome of the given referendum based on collected referendum forms
      Parameters:
      referendum - The referendum to be evaluated
      referendumForms - The list of referendum forms collected for the referendum
      Returns:
      The result of the referendum evaluation, including the outcome and statistics
